meaning: adj.乖戾的,易怒的,难懂的,潦草的
examples: He's not half as bad as he looks, for all he's so crabbed.
Ben Weatherstaff's crabbed old face was still wet with that one queer rush of tears.
There was a queer mixture of crabbed tenderness and shrewd understanding in his manner.
Doug Springsteen was an Army driver in Europe during the Second World War who came home and seethed at his crabbed circumstances.
